name: hud_ui_background_free_loaded_tree_roots
description: HudUiBackground::FreeLoadedTreeRoots releases the loaded zReader tree when present and clears both loadedRoot and cfgRoot.
known_limits: VC6 12.00.8168 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 31 unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 42 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes with 10 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
Reviewed drift is the compiler keeping zero in edi, emitting push/pop edi, cmp ecx,edi, and stores from edi; retail uses test ecx,ecx and immediate zero stores to loadedRoot and cfgRoot.

A local loadedRoot temporary, typed integer zero stores, memset clearing, and VC6 profile sweep did not improve the byte diff; VC5 profiles do not currently compile this full zhud_ui.cpp translation unit.

The focused smoke covers the non-null loadedRoot path through zReader::FreeLoadedTree, ignores the unused stack argument, clears loadedRoot and cfgRoot, and remains safe when called again with a null loadedRoot.
